meta.title: International Committee on Systematics of Prokaryotes Subcommittee on the taxonomy of the Halomonadaceae: Minutes of the inaugural meetings, 31 July 2002, Paris, France
meta.journalTitle: International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology

abstractHtml:
Minute 1. Call to order
The inaugural meeting of the subcommittee was held on 31 July 2002 at the Palais de Congrès in Paris, France. The meeting was called to order at 14 : 32 by the chairman, Dr Antonio Ventosa.
